name: @metorial/slack
description: Slack: connect with bot OAuth or user OAuth to work with messages, conversations, search, files, Canvases, Lists, profiles, reactions, reminders, and workspace productivity settings.
skills: send and schedule messages as a bot or user
search public Slack content and consented private content
read threads and resolve message permalinks
manage reminders, user status, presence, and do-not-disturb settings
find channels, users, and custom emoji
